3267940.name: IAI
3267940.description:
I AI is a VR-only multiplayer puzzle game designed for two players. Set in a fragmented sci-fi world, the game focuses on communication, coordination, puzzle solving, and narrative-driven challenges. You and your partner must work together—often in unusual situations—to uncover a mystery rooted in time, memory, and identity.

Play as one of two androids learning to think, feel, and communicate like humans.

Rely on voice, visual cues, and shared reasoning to make progress.

Each puzzle is crafted to test how well you can interpret information, exchange ideas, and work as one.

Designed from the ground up for virtual reality, I AI offers a fully immersive experience. Interact naturally with your environment using motion controls—grab objects, point, draw, operate tools, and use gestures to communicate with your partner.

Puzzles are crafted specifically for VR, relying on physical interaction, spatial reasoning, and both verbal and non-verbal cooperation. You’ll use your environment to solve challenges, align shapes in 3D space, manipulate tactile interfaces, or signal your partner through barriers—experiences that simply don’t translate outside of VR.

Progress depends not just on logic, but on how clearly you can convey what you see, understand what your partner describes, and think together. Communication isn’t just a feature—it’s one of the core elements of gameplay.

I AI is built entirely around two players. There’s no single-player mode, no AI companion—only real cooperation between people. From start to finish, the experience is designed for shared play.

You and your partner must rely on each other to make progress. Communication isn’t just encouraged—it’s essential. The game rewards conversation, coordination, and mutual understanding.

Every challenge is meant to be faced together. Multiplayer isn’t just a mode—it’s the heart of the story and the core of the experience.

Each player experiences the world differently. No single perspective is enough to solve the game’s challenges. I AI is built around asymmetrical puzzle design—where both players see and interact with different parts of the environment.

You’ll each have distinct tools, information, and responsibilities. One player might see a diagram while the other holds the controls. One may hear a tone the other cannot. Success depends on describing symbols, relaying patterns, interpreting clues, and syncing actions—often relying entirely on your partner’s perception.

It’s not about individual skill, but shared understanding. You’ll explain, guess, and guide each other toward solutions that neither could reach alone. Whether you’re across the room or across the world, I AI makes communication the core mechanic. You’re not just solving puzzles—you’re learning how to think together.

I AI supports full cross-play between PC VR and Meta Quest headsets, allowing players to connect and play together across platforms.

Whether you’re on a high-end PC setup or a standalone headset, the experience remains consistent and seamless. No extra setup, no limitations—just find a partner and begin. The game is optimized for smooth performance and parity across systems, ensuring that your experience is shaped by cooperation—not by hardware.

I AI tells a layered story—a puzzle in itself—uncovered through dialogue, fragmented memories, and environmental detail. You play as two androids, searching for purpose and trying to understand the final days of human civilization.

At the center of this mystery are the Dreamers—human children exposed to alien technology.

Their memories are the clues to what happened to us.

The story unfolds gradually as you progress. Through shared discoveries and quiet details, you’ll reconstruct a timeline shaped by loss, transformation, and the question of what it truly means to be human.

I AI supports full-body presence in VR, allowing you to see more than just floating hands. You’ll move, gesture, point, and interact using your whole body—adding weight and clarity to communication with your partner.

This deeper embodiment helps with both expression and immersion. Subtle movements become part of how you collaborate—whether you’re pointing out a clue, nodding in agreement, or silently gesturing through glass.
3267940.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
